name: Pink Peppermint Chiffon Pie
recipeIngredient: Baked 9-inch crust or purchased chocolate wafer crust
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the sugar, crushed peppermint candy, gelatin, and salt. Stir in milk and yolks. Cook and stir mixture until bubbly. Cook and stir for 2 more minutes.
2. Remove from heat; stir in red food coloring (optional). Chill mixture until partially set (consistency of beaten egg whites).
3. Beat whipping cream until soft peaks form. Fold into gelatin mixture. Chill until the mixture mounds when spooned.
4. Spoon into crust. Chill 4 hours, or until firm.
5. Top with additional whipped cream and crushed peppermint candy, if desired. Refrigerate. Serves 8.
NOTE: For a chocolate pie crust, add 2 tablespoons sugar and 2 tablespoons unsweetened cocoa powder to the flour when making a single 9-inch crust. From Midwest Living, Oct. '94 submitted by Arlene Barber of Rantoul, IL. Goes well with either a chocolate crumb crust or regular. Good anytime, but Arlene's sons and grandsons insist on it with Christmas dinner every year. Kim Clegg.
